message:
feat(net): replace ambient time in DNS resolver and Happy Eyeballs

Continues the project-wide ambient time elimination into networking:

DNS Resolver:
- Add time_getter field and with_time_getter() constructor
- Cache TTL checks, retry cooldowns, and health tracking use injectable
  time source instead of Instant::now()
- Add deterministic test infrastructure and tests

Happy Eyeballs (RFC 8305):
- Add time_getter to HappyEyeballsConfig and HappyEyeballsState
- Connection attempt timing, interleave delays, and timeout calculations
  use injectable time source
- Add with_time_getter() builder method
- Add deterministic test helpers and timing verification tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
